title: FabricationInstructionReviewInterfaces
description: Shared cross-runtime JSON payloads for imported fabrication instruction review workers that validate, improve, and boundary-label existing G-code, NC programs, slicer files, sheet-cutting jobs, setup sheets, and operator instructions before planner release.

FabricationSubmittedInstruction.title: FabricationSubmittedInstruction
FabricationSubmittedInstruction.description: One submitted instruction artifact or inline snippet that needs validation, boundary analysis, or improvement.

format.description: Instruction format such as GCODE, NC, TAP, 3MF, BAMBUPROJECT, SETUP_SHEET_MD, TOOL_LIST_JSON, INSPECTION_PLAN_JSON, POSTPROCESS_PLAN_MD, SHEET_CUTTING_JOB_JSON, RESIN_JOB, POWDER_BED_JOB, or SHOP_TEXT.

sourceUri.description: Sanitized source URI or object key. Do not include credentials, query strings, or fragments.

sha256.description: SHA-256 of the submitted instruction when available.

machineClass.description: Intended machine class such as additive-fdm, additive-resin, powder-bed, vertical-mill, horizontal-mill, lathe, router, laser, waterjet, plasma, postprocess-station, inspection, or assembly.

controllerDialect.description: Declared or inferred controller dialect such as Marlin, RepRap, Klipper, Haas NGC, Fanuc, LinuxCNC, GRBL, Heidenhain, Okuma, PrusaSlicer, OrcaSlicer, Cura, Bambu Studio, or SHOP_TEXT.

previewLines.description: Short sanitized preview lines. Do not embed full programs in the envelope.

FabricationInstructionReviewScope.title: FabricationInstructionReviewScope
FabricationInstructionReviewScope.description: Review scope requested for one submitted instruction.

instructionId.description: Submitted instruction id this scope reviews.

reviewKind.description: Review kind such as syntax, modal-state, machine-envelope, material-state, thermal-state, workholding, toolpath, arc-geometry, cutter-comp, tool-change, setup-sheet, postprocess, human-intervention-boundaries, improvement-draft, or release-readiness.

machineId.description: Machine id or profile id to review against when known.

requiredEvidence.description: Evidence labels required before the planner can accept this review scope for release.

FabricationInstructionReviewFinding.title: FabricationInstructionReviewFinding
FabricationInstructionReviewFinding.description: One validation finding, warning, risk, or informational note from a submitted instruction review.

severity.description: Severity such as info, warning, error, blocker, or critical.

code.description: Stable finding code, e.g. arc-plane-missing, cutter-comp-uncancelled, spindle-start-missing-speed, extrusion-after-cooldown, workholding-evidence-missing, support-media-stopped, or operator-pause-unresolved.

message.description: Human-readable finding summary safe for logs.

instructionId.description: Instruction id associated with this finding.

scopeId.description: Review scope id associated with this finding.

lineRef.description: Line, block, section, or instruction reference. Avoid embedding full source programs.

machineReadyImpact.description: Effect on release posture, e.g. blocks-machine-ready, needs-operator-review, warning-only, improvement-only, or informational.

FabricationInstructionFailureBoundary.title: FabricationInstructionFailureBoundary
FabricationInstructionFailureBoundary.description: A boundary where submitted instructions may fail, pause, require human intervention, require splitting/combining, or need extra machine/setup evidence.

boundaryKind.description: Boundary kind such as human-intervention, controller-state, modal-state, thermal-state, workholding, toolpath, sheet-support, material-conditioning, split-required, combine-required, inspection, or postprocess.

message.description: Human-readable boundary summary safe for logs.

instructionId.description: Instruction id associated with this boundary.

lineRef.description: Line, block, section, or instruction reference. Avoid embedding full source programs.

humanInterventionRequired.description: True when the boundary requires explicit human action or review.

recommendedAction.description: Recommended action such as add-evidence, request-human-review, stop-before-cycle, rehome, reheat, split-program, combine-parts, reroute-process, or reject-program.

FabricationInstructionImprovementDraft.title: FabricationInstructionImprovementDraft
FabricationInstructionImprovementDraft.description: A proposed safe improvement, patch, rewrite, split, or operator instruction change for submitted instructions.

draftKind.description: Draft kind such as add-modal-reset, add-temperature-wait, add-workholding-check, add-tool-change-stop, split-program, combine-setup, add-inspection-step, add-operator-pause, or reject-with-reason.

patchUri.description: Sanitized URI for a retained patch or rewritten artifact when available.

previewLines.description: Short sanitized preview lines for the proposed change. Do not include full programs here.

requiresHumanApproval.description: True when the improvement draft needs explicit human approval before planner release.

evidence.description: Evidence labels supporting this improvement draft.

FabricationInstructionReviewRequest.title: FabricationInstructionReviewRequest
FabricationInstructionReviewRequest.description: Body published on dd.remote.fabrication.instructions.review.requests for workers that validate and improve imported fabrication instructions.

schema.description: Envelope schema id. Producers should emit dd.fabrication.instruction-review.request.v1.

requestId.description: Unique id for this instruction review job, suitable for dedupe and result correlation.

planRequestId.description: Fabrication planning request id that spawned this review job.

jobId.description: Optional fabrication job id when the planner has already persisted one.

emittedAtMs.description: Unix epoch milliseconds when the planner published this review request.

producer.description: Producer service instance or deployment name.

resultSubject.description: Subject workers should publish the result to; defaults to dd.remote.fabrication.instructions.review.results.

instructions.description: Submitted fabrication instruction artifacts or snippets to review.

reviewScopes.description: Requested validation, boundary, and improvement scopes.

knownEvidence.description: Evidence labels the planner already has before review.

priority.description: Optional scheduling hint. Higher values mean more urgent instruction review work.

FabricationInstructionReviewResult.title: FabricationInstructionReviewResult
FabricationInstructionReviewResult.description: Body published on dd.remote.fabrication.instructions.review.results with validation findings, failure boundaries, improvement drafts, warnings, and release posture.

schema.description: Envelope schema id. Workers should emit dd.fabrication.instruction-review.result.v1.

requestId.description: Instruction review request id this result answers.

planRequestId.description: Fabrication planning request id from the original instruction review request.

jobId.description: Optional persisted fabrication job id from the original request.

emittedAtMs.description: Unix epoch milliseconds when the review worker published this result.

workerId.description: Worker id, pod name, or adapter instance that produced this result.

reviewer.description: Reviewer, analyzer, simulator, parser, postprocessor, or adapter used.

reviewerVersion.description: Reviewer or adapter version used for repeatability and audit.

success.description: True when the worker completed the requested review work.

machineReady.description: True only when submitted instructions and evidence are sufficient for the planner to consider release.

findings.description: Validation findings emitted by the review worker.

failureBoundaries.description: Machine-failure and human-intervention boundaries found in submitted instructions.

improvementDrafts.description: Proposed safe improvements, patches, rewrites, splits, combines, or operator instructions.

warnings.description: Non-blocking warnings that should be retained with review evidence.

reviewMetadata.description: Free-form non-secret metadata such as parser dialect, simulator id, modal summary, machine profile, or review confidence.
